name: MXC Sandbox Execution
description: OS-level sandboxed tool execution via MXC for MXC-capable Windows hosts: runs commands in ProcessContainer (Windows) with configured MXC policy files.

network.description: Use none for default-deny networking, or default to allow outbound networking

timeoutSeconds.description: Explicit per-command timeout in seconds. When omitted, the resolved sandbox baseline timeout applies.

mxcPolicyPaths.description: Absolute MXC sandbox policy JSON file paths. Files are loaded in array order.
